task.title: Build source-owned CodeWiki audit tool and /audit command
task.summary: Create the source-owned audit engine and single /audit [flags] user command with profile-scoped machine-readable evidence; scripts may wrap it but cannot own audit semantics.

goal.outcome: Users, gateways, and agents invoke the same source-owned audit engine for full or scoped audits, and audit results are machine-readable evidence.
acceptance: Audit engine lives in source-owned application/domain code, not scripts, and supports full and selected audit profiles.
Internal agent-callable audit tool runs full audit and selected profiles through the shared application API.
/audit command wraps the same engine and supports file-structure, security, alignment, package, changed, task, and layer flags.
Audit output includes profile, checked scopes, issues, evidence refs, and source/content fingerprints where available.
Tests cover default full audit and at least three scoped profiles.
non_goals: Do not make audits decide gateway verdicts directly.
Do not require full audit for every gateway call.
Do not place authoritative audit rules in scripts.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: Implemented TASK-079 source-owned audit engine, codewiki_audit tool, /audit command, script wrapper demotion, and smoke coverage.

evidence: Added audit smoke to load packaged extension, run codewiki_audit default full profile set, run three scoped profiles, and invoke /audit --file-structure command.
Updated package smoke expectations so public command/tool registration includes audit surfaces.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Added source-owned audit engine under src/application/tools/audit.ts with deterministic profile results and content fingerprints.
Moved architecture boundary check script to a thin wrapper over the source audit engine.
Added Pi adapter command/tool wrappers that translate external inputs to the shared application API.
notes: Full source audit passes with profiles alignment, file-structure, stale-reference, package, security, and generated-parity.
Scripts remain optional wrappers and no longer own architecture audit rules.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Added audit smoke to load packaged extension, run codewiki_audit default full profile set, run three scoped profiles, and invoke /audit --file-structure command.
Updated package smoke expectations so public command/tool registration includes audit surfaces.
code_change_evidence: Added source-owned audit engine under src/application/tools/audit.ts with deterministic profile results and content fingerprints.
Moved architecture boundary check script to a thin wrapper over the source audit engine.
Added Pi adapter command/tool wrappers that translate external inputs to the shared application API.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Audit engine lives in source-owned application/domain code, not scripts, and supports full and selected audit profiles.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: src/application/tools/audit.ts owns profile selection/execution for full and scoped profiles; src/domain/shared/types.ts defines audit profile/report contracts; scripts/check-architecture.mjs delegates to executeCodewikiAudit without authoritative rules.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Internal agent-callable audit tool runs full audit and selected profiles through the shared application API.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: src/adapters/pi/tools/audit.ts registers codewiki_audit and calls executeCodewikiAudit; src/adapters/pi/schemas.ts exposes typed profile/layer/task/changed inputs.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: /audit command wraps the same engine and supports file-structure, security, alignment, package, changed, task, and layer flags.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: src/adapters/pi/commands/audit.ts parses /audit flags and calls executeCodewikiAudit; tests/smoke/audit.test.mjs invokes /audit --file-structure.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Audit output includes profile, checked scopes, issues, evidence refs, and source/content fingerprints where available.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: AuditReport/AuditProfileResult types include profiles, checked_scopes, issues, evidence_refs, and fingerprints; audit smoke asserts package.json sha256 fingerprint.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Tests cover default full audit and at least three scoped profiles.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: tests/smoke/audit.test.mjs checks default full audit plus file-structure, security, and package scoped profiles; package-smoke asserts command/tool registration.

closure_brief.user_intent: Build a source-owned CodeWiki audit engine and /audit command so scripts stop owning authoritative audit semantics.
implemented_changes: Added source-owned audit profile engine and report types.
Added codewiki_audit tool and /audit command wrappers over the same engine.
Demoted scripts/check-architecture.mjs to a source-engine wrapper.
Added audit smoke coverage and updated package smoke/README/skill surfaces.
acceptance_evidence: Source audit engine owns rules and profile orchestration; architecture script delegates.
codewiki_audit tool and /audit command registered and tested.
Smoke test covers default full audit and scoped file-structure/security/package profiles.
non_goals_preserved: Audits do not decide gateway verdicts directly.
Full audit is not required for every gateway call.
Scripts do not own authoritative audit rules.
remaining_risks: TASK-081 remains open for deeper file-structure/package drift checks and fixtures.

risks: TASK-081 still owns deeper migration of remaining architecture drift checks and fixtures; this task only establishes shared audit substrate and command/tool surface.

restore.note: Restored history is reference material until promoted into active knowledge or roadmap truth.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-079 Build source-owned CodeWiki audit tool and /audit command implementation evidence
commit.body:
Implemented TASK-079 source-owned audit engine, codewiki_audit tool, /audit command, script wrapper demotion, and smoke coverage.

Checks: npm run typecheck, npm run check:architecture, node ./tests/smoke/audit.test.mjs, npm run test:smoke, npm test, node - <<'NODE' ... executeCodewikiAudit(default full) ... NODE
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
